## Summary

- describe the change
- describe the user-facing impact

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`

## Windows Verification

- [ ] Not applicable
- [ ] Verified manually on Windows

Notes:

- include packaging, hotkey, HUD, auto paste, or Azure validation details when relevant
- attach screenshots or short recordings for UI changes when useful

## Checklist

- [ ] linked issue or explained why no issue was needed
- [ ] updated docs if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] kept secrets, transcript content, and local machine data out of the PR
